data.name: Ream Naval Base Expansion
data.description: Chinese-funded Cambodian base. New pier, barracks, fuel depot. Exclusive PLA access strongly suspected. Second overseas base.

data.name: Jilin ICBM Silo Field
data.description: 300+ ICBM silos under construction per FAS/Pentagon 2021-2024. DF-41 expected. Part of tripling warheads by 2035.

data.name: Gansu ICBM Silo Field
data.description: 110+ silos near Yumen. DF-41 ICBM. Commercial satellite imagery confirms ongoing construction.

data.name: Hainan Underground Expansion
data.description: Expanded underground submarine tunnel system south coast Hainan. Type 096 SSBN likely.

data.name: Russia Sarmat Silo Upgrades
data.description: RS-28 Sarmat ICBM silo upgrades. Uzhur and Dombarovsky missile divisions. Replacing SS-18 Satan.

data.name: Punggye-ri Tunnel Reconstruction
data.description: North Korea rebuilding tunnel infrastructure at nuclear test site. Previously demolished 2018.

data.name: Fordow Expansion
data.description: New centrifuge galleries confirmed IAEA. Increasing 60% enrichment capacity. Breaching JCPOA limits.

data.name: India Andaman INS Kohassa
data.description: Runway extension. P-8I Poseidon and MQ-9B SeaGuardian. Controls Malacca approach. India power projection.

data.name: Kyaukpyu Deep Sea Port Myanmar
data.description: CMEC port $7.3B. Bypasses Malacca for Chinese energy imports. Myanmar CPEC equivalent.

data.name: Sevastopol Submarine Pens Repair
data.description: Damage repair from Ukrainian naval drone strikes 2022-2024. Ongoing reconstruction Black Sea Fleet facilities.
